Defines PULSE2 transport protocol event registry with protocol numbers and handler directives.

# Purpose
The code defines a set of constants and directives for the PULSE2 transport protocol event registry. It specifies protocol numbers for both best-effort and reliable transport and control protocols using `#define` directives. The code includes macros for registering packet handlers, initialization functions, and link state change handlers. These handlers are associated with specific protocol numbers and are expected to follow predefined function signatures. The file is intended to be included in other C source files to facilitate the handling of transport protocol events in a network communication system.
